title: Japanese firm launches hyper-realistic capsule toy PC parts you can assemble and play with tiny motherboards, cases, and CPUs are coming after Tarlin inks collab with the big four PC parts makers
summary: A Japanese firm collaborates with major PC makers to create mini PC components, such as motherboards, cases, and CPUs, to be used in a toy assembling experience.
insight: Miniaturization of tech could inspire future innovation and education

title: Get an RTX 5060 gaming laptop loaded with Ryzen 7 CPU and 32GB RAM for $1,099 mobile gaming upgrade just got $300 cheaper
summary: The Gigabyte Aero X16 is a mid-range gaming laptop offering smooth high-refresh displays and capable RTX 5060 graphics performance. It also features future-ready upgrade options, making it an attractive choice for gamers. This laptop is now available for $1,099.
insight: High-performance gaming at an affordable price point emerges

title: Apple reportedly lobbies Uncle Sam for access to Chinese memory chips tech giant allegedly wants to buy from blacklisted CXMT
summary: Apple is lobbying the US government to allow access to cheaper Chinese RAM from CXMT, a company currently designated as a Chinese military entity, despite a recent price hike.
insight: US-China tech tensions may soften for economic gain

title: Steam Machine scalping hits $3,000 on eBay as sellers list preorder reservations scalpers already flipping queues for 2X the MSRP of the 2TB model
summary: Steam Machine pre-orders are being sold at markups 140-167% above MSRP on eBay, with some listings reaching $3,000, demonstrating the demand and willingness to pay premium prices for the device.
insight: Scalpers are capitalizing on high demand for the Steam Machine.

title: Intel's next-gen 52-core Nova Lake CPU could pull up to 474W high-end LGA1954 motherboards may need three 8-pin power connectors to feed the monster
summary: Intel's next-gen Nova Lake CPU may have a 52-core design with a 474W power limit, and the new LGA1954 platform could introduce motherboard tiers with optional triple EPS power connectors for high-end CPUs.
insight: Power-hungry flagship CPUs require significant upgrades to motherboard infrastructure.

title: Bambu Lab A2L 3D printer review: The A1 grows up
summary: Bambu Lab's A2L 3D printer features an upgraded larger print bed size.
insight: Wider print options for increased productivity and creative freedom.

title: Modded Steam Controller can automatically charge itself like a robot vacuum enthusiast creates GitHub program that uses the vibration motor to walk it back to its docking station
summary: A modded Steam Controller project uses computer vision and haptic motors to automatically charge itself by sliding back to its docking station. A web app allows users to try this functionality using a webcam. This innovative solution enables seamless charging for Steam Controller enthusiasts.
insight: Enabling autonomous charging for Steam Controllers with haptic motor guidance.

title: Arduino launches Modulino Hub and Extender modules to support up to 64 I2C devices, 30-meter range
summary: Arduino introduces the Modulino Hub and Extender to expand I2C capabilities, supporting up to 64 devices and extending the range to 30 meters.
insight: Overcoming I2C limitations for complex builds with long-range communication.

title: Research at UAB underway on wearables that are thin and durable
summary: Researchers at UAB are developing ultra-thin, durable wearables using molybdenum disulfide ribbons. These sensors aim to be worn for extended periods on human skin. The proof of concept is a crucial step in making this technology a reality.
insight: Long-term wearability of ultra-thin sensors improves health monitoring accuracy.

title: Best of Sensors: Electro Scan s Solar Drone Wins Ag & Enviro
summary: The Electro Scan Solar Drone uses imaging sensors to inspect and clean solar arrays, efficiently navigating challenging terrain like mountains and rooftops. This innovative technology won the Best of Sensors 2026 award in the ag and environmental category. It enhances solar panel maintenance and efficiency.
insight: Advancing solar panel maintenance through efficient and accessible inspection technology.

title: PlayStation sales just had its worst May in 25 years, and Xbox's was the worst ever
summary: PlayStation sales hit a 25-year low in May 2026, while Xbox sales plummeted to their worst ever in the US. This decline marks a significant downturn for both gaming giants. The numbers were released by market research firm Circana.
insight: Declining console sales raise concerns about gaming industry's long-term growth

title: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 gets staggered release after Trump administration cites national security concerns
summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 is released in stages due to national security concerns. The flagship model, Sol, has a robust safety stack. Terra, another model, is 2x cheaper than GPT-5.5.
insight: National security concerns hinder AI advancements globally

title: Trump threatens 100% tariffs on any country imposing digital services taxes on US tech firms
summary: The US is threatening 100% tariffs on countries imposing digital services taxes on US tech firms.
insight: US tech firms face global tax disputes and trade retaliation risks.

title: The Steam Machine is sold out, overpriced, can't quite do 4K and now scalpers are asking $3,000 for it
summary: The Steam Machine is facing criticism over its price and performance, with some scalpers asking $3,000. Despite its limitations, it has inspired new features from users. This may be the only new hardware from Valve accessible to users for now.
insight: High price and performance issues harm Steam Machine's consumer appeal.
